creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mathias Monnerville from comment #4)

For future cases, feel free to provide "later version" patches in existing open bugzilla issues rather than creating new ones. We can just adjust the Summary field to suit the newer version, in this case for instance would have changed:

www/glpi: Update to 9.4.3 

to 

www/glpi: Update to 9.4.5
